what_to_check: Agent must say company name AND their own name
when_to_check: Always — at very start of call
good_example: Thank you for calling Customer Service Desk, my name is John
bad_example: What's up? Hey what can I help you with?

what_to_check: Agent must verify User ID or Full Name AND get callback number
good_example: Can I have your first and last name? And a callback number?
bad_example: Who is this? Thanks what's up?

what_to_check: Agent must thank user, call by name, and offer to help
good_example: Thank you for that information, how can I help you today?
bad_example: Silence... waiting for user to explain

what_to_check: Agent asks clarifying questions and confirms understanding
good_example: Just to confirm, you're saying the device is freezing?

what_to_check: Agent provided a clear solution or next steps
good_example: I have resolved the issue. Your files are now on OneDrive.
bad_example: I don't know what's wrong, call back later.

what_to_check: Agent asked permission before hold and thanked after
good_example: May I place you on a brief hold? Thank you for holding.
bad_example: Hold on. [places on hold with no warning]

what_to_check: Agent correctly escalated or set expectations for follow-up
good_example: I'll escalate this. You can expect a call within 24 hours.
bad_example: I can't help you with that. Goodbye.

what_to_check: Agent maintained calm, professional, empathetic tone
good_example: I completely understand how frustrating that must be.

what_to_check: Agent explained steps in simple, clear language
good_example: Click the OneDrive icon, then right-click and select Settings.
bad_example: Just do the thing with the sync folder config.

what_to_check: Agent confirmed resolution and asked if anything else needed
good_example: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

what_to_check: Agent thanked customer and gave a professional goodbye
when_to_check: At the very end of the call
good_example: Thank you for calling, have a great day!

what_to_check: Agent briefly summarized what was done during the call
good_example: Today I helped you recover your BitLocker key and free up space.
